title: SkyDeck.ai for Trainers & Consultants — Ship Your Methods as Agents
description: Package your methods into custom agents and Agent Pods your clients run daily, operate sessions together with one Driver at a time, and manage every client from one console.
h1: Ship Your Expertise as Agents Clients Use Daily
lede: Turn your methods into custom tools and Agent Pods your clients run between sessions, operate live with one Driver at a time, and manage every client from the Control Center.
html:
Package your methods into agents your clients run every day — in workspaces you build, publish, and govern.

Turn your expertise into agents and tools

Your value is a way of working. SkyDeck.ai lets you encode it: build custom tools and agents that put your methods into practice, then publish them to the clients who need them. Clients use them between sessions, in their own governed workspace, so your engagement keeps delivering long after the workshop ends. Build them yourself in GenStudio, or let our team build them with you. Either way, the tool carries your name and your approach, not a generic template — which is exactly what clients pay a premium for.

  • Give clients tools and agents they actually use between sessions.
  • Add recurring revenue on top of your existing programs.
  • Win new business with AI-enhanced offerings your competitors do not have.

Publish a pod, not just a prompt

For deeper work, ship an Agent Pod — a persistent cloud workspace with your agent and setup already inside. Build a custom image once and publish it to a client group; scope which groups can launch which pods; and let each pod run around the clock, auto-sleeping when idle. Everything in /workspace persists, so a client returns to exactly the state they left, and a pod that has been asleep for a week resumes without losing a thing. It is your methodology, delivered as a workspace clients can run on their own. A junior member of a client's team can launch it and get your senior-level process, exactly as you designed it.

Run the session together

Training is hands-on, and so is SkyDeck. Operate one agent together with a single Driver at the keyboard while participants observe live and read-only, then hand control to a learner in a click so they try it themselves. It turns a demo into practice — everyone in the same terminal, watching the same real work, across any set of time zones. Learners leave having done the thing, not just seen it done.

  • One Driver at a time — lead from the front, then pass the keyboard to a participant.
  • Read-only observers — a whole cohort follows the exact session, not a slide about it.
  • Share a snapshot — publish a conversation anyone can open without an account, and see views and clicks.

Smart tools for every industry

Equip learners with tools tailored to their field — coding, accounting, design, copywriting, and more. Automate the repetitive parts of their work, build custom tools for a specific need, and schedule AI conversations to arrive in Slack or email on a cadence, like a standing briefing your clients come to rely on. Each custom tool you ship becomes another reason for a client to renew, and another offering you can sell to the next one. Because the workspace reaches every major model through one interface, you are never tied to a single provider as your programs grow.

Manage every client from one console

The Control Center keeps a growing client base simple. Oversee all your clients from one interface, transfer seats between them as needs change, and track billing and usage so every engagement stays transparent and profitable. Spend guardrails keep each client's costs bounded, so you can scale your roster without scaling your risk. Onboard a new client in minutes by publishing them the pods and tools you have already built.

  • Centralized oversight — manage every client from a single dashboard.
  • Flexible seats — move seats between clients as their needs change.
  • Spend guardrails — a monthly budget, per-group caps, a concurrency limit, and idle auto-sleep on every account.

See the Agent Pods guide, or the Agent Pods page for the full picture.

Get started
